test_description: Compare the same content once with numbering and once without numbering.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether numbering is improperly influencing excerpt identity.
why_this_test_matters: It directly tests the owner’s strongest rejection.

test_description: Create an 8-point list where each point is genuinely about a different ruling.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether the system wrongly keeps the list merged due to shared source context.
why_this_test_matters: It targets the user’s explicit follow-up.

test_description: Test a point with attached explanation that should remain together.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Over-splitting of a point from its own explanatory continuation.
why_this_test_matters: The current point 2 pattern depends on this.

test_description: Use a point that explains a hadith while also repeating a ruling.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Failure to recognize multi-function and multiple placements.
why_this_test_matters: Point 1 is the owner’s explicit example.

test_description: Present a numbered point with and without easy access to neighboring points and list introduction.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether reassurance needs are being ignored.
why_this_test_matters: Context anxiety is central to adoption risk.

test_description: Force all points from one list into a single entry regardless of content.
why_this_test_matters: This is the opposite extreme of numbering bias.

test_description: Check whether the system turns “usually separate” into “always separate”.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: False hardening of a descriptive tendency into a rule.
why_this_test_matters: The owner’s tension must not be flattened.

test_description: Compare library handling of numbered points against simply reading the book.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether the library truly gives enough benefit and reassurance to beat the baseline methodology.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly raises abandonment risk.

test_description: Use a point whose text fits both a ruling leaf and a disagreement-related leaf.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Failure to permit justified multi-leaf placement.
why_this_test_matters: Multi-function placement is a core pressure of this case.
